audit_items.proof_trace: The balance check at L437-440 reads `IERC20(asset).balanceOf(address(this))` and reverts with `BidAmountTooHigh` if `amount > availableBalance`; this check precedes the transfer at L444. The reentrancy guard set at L418 (`s_entered = true`) prevents any reentrant call from draining the balance between the check and the transfer, making the guard sufficient on all reachable paths.
